manifests.contents:
[workspace]
members = ["nook-core", "nook-wasm"]
resolver = "3"

[workspace.package]
edition = "2024"
version = "0.0.1"
description = "Rust core, wasm bindings, and Svelte web app for Nook."
license = "MIT"
repository = "https://github.com/meta-secret/nook"

[profile.dev.package."*"]
opt-level = 3

[package]
name = "nook-core"

[package.edition]
workspace = true

[package.version]
workspace = true

[package.description]
workspace = true

[package.license]
workspace = true

[package.repository]
workspace = true

[dependencies]
base64 = "0.22"
bip39 = "2.2.2"
getrandom = "0.2.17"
hex = "0.4.3"
serde_json = "1.0.150"
serde_yaml = "0.9.34"
sha2 = "0.10.9"

[dependencies.age]
version = "0.11.3"
features = ["armor"]

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0.228"
features = ["derive"]

[target.'cfg(target_arch = "wasm32")'.dependencies.getrandom]
version = "0.2.17"
features = ["js"]

[target.'cfg(target_arch = "wasm32")'.dev-dependencies]

[target.'cfg(target_arch = "wasm32")'.build-dependencies]

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
name = "nook_core"
required-features = []
crate-type = ["lib"]

[package]
name = "nook-wasm"

[package.edition]
workspace = true

[package.version]
workspace = true

[package.description]
workspace = true

[package.license]
workspace = true

[package.repository]
workspace = true

[dependencies]
base64 = "0.21.7"
flume = "0.11.0"
hex = "0.4.3"
js-sys = "0.3"
rexie = "0.6.2"
serde-wasm-bindgen = "0.6.5"
serde_json = "1.0.150"
thiserror = "2.0.18"
wasm-bindgen = "0.2.125"
wasm-bindgen-futures = "0.4"

[dependencies.getrandom]
version = "0.2.17"
features = ["js"]

[dependencies.nook-core]
path = "../nook-core"

[dependencies.reqwest]
version = "0.12.12"
features = ["json"]
default-features = false

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1.0.228"
features = ["derive"]

[lib]
path = "src/lib.rs"
name = "nook_wasm"
required-features = []
crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]
